incidents.title: Data Exfiltration Attempt — Customer PII

timeline.action: GuardDuty alert: Unusual S3 API calls from internal IP
SOC analyst escalated to P1 — IR team activated
Affected EC2 instance isolated via Security Group change
Forensic snapshot taken; GuardDuty findings exported
Root cause identified: compromised developer credentials
All IAM credentials rotated; MFA enforced

incidents.lessons_learned: Developer MFA bypass policy discovered. Mandatory MFA now enforced via IAM policy.

timeline.action: SIEM alert: Shadow copy deletion commands on FS-14
Host 10.14.22.45 isolated at network switch level
AWS RDS snapshots triggered as precaution
CrowdStrike Falcon containment applied to FS-14

incidents.title: MFA Bypass — VPN Access

timeline.action: User reported MFA not prompting on VPN login
Misconfigured Okta policy identified — MFA exemption group too broad
Audit log review complete — no unauthorized access confirmed

incidents.lessons_learned: IAM policy change review gate added. MFA exemptions require CISO sign-off.

dr_scenarios.name: Primary Data Center Total Loss
steps: Activate DR runbook DR-001 in ServiceNow
Route 53 health check triggers automatic DNS failover to us-west-2
EC2 Auto Scaling launches in secondary region
Notify OCC and Fed Reserve within 2-hour SLA

dr_scenarios.name: Ransomware — Full Restore
steps: Isolate all affected systems at network layer
Restore from AWS Backup immutable vault (last clean snapshot)
Rebuild compromised systems from golden AMIs
File FinCEN report if customer data impacted
